package rulefixtures

// scenario for defer_in_tight_loop: `defer` statements inside loops with > 100 iterations or visible hot-path markers
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule476PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario476Positive(records []Rule476PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
